problem_statement: Implement driftEncode(text, shift) in ts/drift.ts, a Caesar cipher whose shift drifts. The first letter of the text is rotated by shift, the second letter by shift+1, the third by shift+2, and so on, wrapping modulo 26 and preserving case. Non-letter characters are copied through unchanged and do not advance the drift counter. Negative shifts and shifts beyond 26 are legal; a non-integer shift throws a RangeError. For example driftEncode("abc", 0) returns "ace". The empty string maps to itself. Verify with bun test tests/ts/drift.
